commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8dec3d5fee64d70ed68d186eabf8a34e8aa90c1f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards the session-memory hook model setting into LLM slug generation and resolves the override before running the embedded slug agent.

PR surface: Source +28. Total +28 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main reads session-memory hook config but never forwards `model`, and the slug generator resolves only the agent default model.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR changes provider/model routing semantics and still needs contributor real hook-run proof that automation cannot supply for the author.

target.title: fix: respect hook config model override in session-memory slug generation (#89551)
target.author: jincheng-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
